name: Venison Soup - Sl 10/82
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Venison; cut into bite-sized pieces
1 can (28 oz) whole tomatoes; undrained and chopped
2 medium Green peppers; cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients in an 8-quart Dutch oven.
2. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to medium and cover.
3. Cook for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in potatoes and carrots; cook covered for another 20 minutes.
5. Add remaining vegetables and cook uncovered for 10 additional minutes or until vegetables are crisp-tender.
6. Yield: 4 quarts.
